speaker: Bo
text: What else do you need for your new apartment, Tý?

speaker: Ty
text: Well, where can I buy a used sofa?

speaker: Bo
text: Why don't you look in the newspaper?

speaker: Ty
text: Good idea. And where can I get shelves?

speaker: Bo
text: I think you can go to Điện Máy Xanh. They have kitchen things. The prices are good.

speaker: Ty
text: OK. And where's a good place to get a TV?

speaker: Ty
text: Maybe I can buy it at Điện Máy Xanh?

speaker: Bo
text: A good place to buy a TV is Điện Máy Xanh.

speaker: Bo
text: Oh, I can give you a TV. I have an extra one at home.
